setting.title: Platform Settings
setting.description: Global platform configuration management, including site info, model API, and system-level settings.
setting.taxonomyDesc: Configure platform data taxonomy and metadata standards
setting.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this model config?
setting.emptyHint: No model configuration yet. Click Add to create one.
setting.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
setting.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields
setting.primaryModelHint: Only one primary model is supported. Setting a new primary model will automatically cancel the previous one.
setting.heroDescription: This maintains platform-level configuration, separate from system administration. Currently covering two core areas: Model API configuration and Site configuration.
setting.infoDescription: {primary} is used for default platform calls; site configuration is used for platform display and deployment registration.
setting.taxonomyBaseDataDesc: Taxonomy is the foundational reference data for germplasm resources, breeding species anchors, and other features. For first-time installation or re-installation, start here.
setting.siteTitlePlaceholder: For page header or browser title display
setting.remarkPlaceholder: Record usage, quota, account info, etc.

taxonomy.title: Taxonomy Initialization
taxonomy.description: Configure platform data taxonomy and metadata standards
taxonomy.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
taxonomy.pageDescription: Taxonomy is the foundational reference data for FAN-CE. Germplasm import, breeding species anchors, and downstream taxonomy-dependent features all rely on the initialization status here.
taxonomy.canReturnTitle: You Can Return to the Original Page
taxonomy.canReturnDesc: After initialization, you can return to: {target}

api.title: API Management
api.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API?
api.pageDescription: View Swagger, ReDoc, and OpenAPI JSON in one place to plan APIs, verify capability boundaries, and coordinate frontend-backend integration.
api.docNoteDesc: Swagger and ReDoc are embedded directly from the backend docs; OpenAPI JSON is fetched and formatted on this page. If the browser CORS policy blocks the JSON, use "Open in New Window".
api.noEndpointFound: No endpoints found for current filter
api.spotlightBreedingDesc: Program, material, trial, sample, observation, and omics association APIs.
api.spotlightDatasetDesc: Dataset/version/asset system and data query adapters.
api.spotlightPlatformDesc: Authentication, menu, user, and platform configuration APIs.

news.title: News Management
news.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this news?
news.tableTitleHelp: Manage team messages, supporting news, meetings, links, etc.
news.author: Author

frpTokenPlaceholder: Must match cloud server frps token
frpFirstTimeDesc: 1. Rent a cheap cloud server; 2. SSH in and run the install script; 3. Fill in the generated token above; 4. Click "Enable Sharing"
frpTunnelStarted: Tunnel enabled, data is publicly accessible
